## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the CavrixOS Engineering Guidelines (`CONTRIBUTING.md`).
- [ ] I have successfully built the ISO locally (`make iso`) to verify this change.
- [ ] Existing `pytest` unit tests pass (`make test`).
- [ ] Any modified `PKGBUILD` files pass `namcap` without errors.
- [ ] Any modified shell scripts pass `shellcheck` without errors.
